name: Hanover Bancorp, Inc. /MD
summary: PartI Overview Hanover Bancorp,Inc., a Maryland corporation(theCompany), is the holding company for Hanover Community Bank(theBank), a NewYork chartered community commercial bank focusing on highly personalized and efficient services and products responsive to local needs. On June25, 2025, the Company completed its reincorporation from NewYork to Maryland. The Bank operates as a locally headquartered, community-oriented bank serving customers throughout the NewYork metro area from offices in Nas...
